title: QA Engineer
description: Elastic is hiring a QA Engineer to ensure our search and analytics platform delivers a seamless, reliable experience for millions of users. You'll design and execute comprehensive test strategies, work closely with developers, and contribute to a culture where quality is everyone's responsibility. If you're detail-oriented, curious about edge cases, and passionate about shipping excellent software, let's talk.
responsibilities: Design and execute automated and manual test cases covering functional, integration, and performance requirements
Write Python or Java test automation scripts using pytest or JUnit frameworks
Collaborate with product and engineering teams to understand requirements and identify test scenarios
Monitor and report on test coverage, defect trends, and quality metrics
Reproduce and document bugs, working with engineers to verify fixes

requirements.education: Bachelor's degree in Computer Science or related field, or equivalent practical experience
skills: Test automation using Python, Java, or JavaScript
SQL for data validation and query testing
Experience with continuous integration/continuous deployment tools

benefits: Comprehensive health, vision, and dental coverage
